title: The World Prepares for the Reverie
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on the world prepares for the reverie within the The World Prepares for the Reverie storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And how long do you expect all of that to last?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: About half a day! The sea is a pretty big place, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WHAT?! It's going to take several days?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Even if we head straight there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Is it even possible for something to be so big?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The sea truly is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A wonder- Land!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Well, it's actually not land at all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This is going to be my first official sleepover!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Eh, it's fine if she comes along. I mean, she's already here and all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You can take care of yourself, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yes! Thank you! I'll be fi-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Who said you could eat my carrot?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: AYAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: My th- throba-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: luffy! Pat her on the head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ehehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: GLUAH! That was a close one! She almost got me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You're a crazy one, I'll give you that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Okay, I guess you can have my carrot. :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: She almost... took out luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: To be fair, she is certainly stronger than your average.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: When the heck did Pedro get all the way up there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Munch Munch Swallow

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Man, I'm Starvin!! Let's have some grub!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Someone, go prepare a feast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: For crying out loud, your skillset is so one dimensional! Fine, I'll do it! Just watch the sea for me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Woo- Hoo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: that'll be 5000 berrys from each of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Wait, wait, wait, wait, wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Coooo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That's almost all my allow-ance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So what're we going to do, then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This sure is a huge title...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'll make the food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Whaaaa?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: "A land that was, for several thousand years, shredded in secrecy"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: "Has finally been discovered."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The headquarters of the Revo- Lutionary Army!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Baltigo, already in ruins!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The world, shaken to its core!

summary: The World Prepares for the Reverie: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
